mapper.select: SELECT t2.* FROM user_role t1,role t2 WHERE t1.role_id = t2.role_id AND t2.role_state = 1 AND t1.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT role_id FROM role WHERE role_name =#{roleName}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM role
and role_name like concat('%',#{roleName},'%')
and role_code like concat('%',#{roleCode},'%')
and role_state =#{roleState}
mapper.update: UPDATE role SET role_State = #{param2} WHERE role_id =#{param1}
